candidates.why: Best direct match for current maturities/current portion of debt; should be included in STD.
Can represent short-term financing debt and is separate from current portion of borrowings; include if reported separately.
Semantically strong, but the preview is blank across shown years and current portion of borrowings provides a clearer reported debt line.
Likely supplemental maturity schedule and appears to align with lease-related liabilities in at least one year; avoid due to possible lease inclusion/double counting.

variables.notes: Selected current debt components only. Excluded 'Current lease liabilities' per rule and excluded 'Liabilities due within 1 Year' because it appears supplemental and may include lease amounts.

variables.notes: No clean single total PPE line is reported. Chose the tangible fixed-asset component block from the balance sheet as the best approximation, but presentation is ambiguous because some items are gross while 'Vessels' may already be net; manual review is advisable.
